rules_text: Reveal up to 2 Blue Team Assets. If Gateway or SCADA Web Interface is revealed, draw 1 card.
flavor_text: The scan came before the splash.
learning_note: Port scanning helps attackers identify exposed services and reachable systems before exploitation.

rules_text: Look at Blue Team's hand. Choose one Asset card from it; Blue Team reveals that card until it is played or discarded.
learning_note: Public information can help attackers understand technology, vendors, staff, and exposed systems.

rules_text: Deal 3 damage to one Asset. If NMAP or OSINT was played this turn, deal +1 damage.
flavor_text: Copied code still breaks real things.
learning_note: Low-skill attackers can cause real impact when public exploit code matches exposed systems.

rules_text: Attach to an Endpoint Asset. At the start of Red Team's turn, that Asset takes 1 damage. Antivirus removes this card.
flavor_text: The package was cheap. The outage was not.
learning_note: Commodity malware can create recurring impact when endpoint containment is delayed.

rules_text: Disable one Operator until Blue Team's next turn unless Blue Team discards 1 card.
learning_note: Phishing often targets staff access and can delay operational response.

rules_text: Deal 2 damage to Operator Laptop or SCADA Web Interface. If Phishing Campaign was played this game, draw 1 card.
flavor_text: One link moved the incident forward.
learning_note: Malicious links are common delivery methods for credential theft and malware.

rules_text: Deal 2 damage to Operator Laptop. If it is damaged, you may play Pre Built Malware Package for 1 less this turn.
flavor_text: The file looked routine until it ran.
learning_note: Attachments can deliver payloads that affect user workstations and operational access.

rules_text: Deal 3 damage to SCADA Web Interface, Gateway, or RTU or PLC. Port Closure reduces this damage by 2.
flavor_text: The weakness was known before the attack.
learning_note: Known vulnerabilities become dangerous when systems remain exposed or unpatched.

rules_text: Deal 3 damage. MFA cancels this card's damage bonus and reduces damage by 1.
flavor_text: The account became the entry point.
learning_note: Credential abuse is a common path into remote and operational systems.

rules_text: Deal 2 damage. If MFA is not active, disable one Operator until Blue Team's next turn.
flavor_text: One weak password can slow a whole team.
learning_note: Password spraying abuses weak or reused credentials across accounts.

rules_text: Attach to Operator Laptop or SCADA Web Interface after it is damaged. Red Team's next Attack against that Asset costs 1 less.
flavor_text: Remote access turned damage into control.
learning_note: Remote access malware or tooling can help attackers maintain access after initial compromise.

rules_text: While active, Red Team may draw 1 card after playing an Install card. Destroy this Asset if Blue Team plays Deep Packet ICS Monitor.
learning_note: Command channels help attackers manage compromised systems and continue operations.

rules_text: Once per turn, reduce the cost of an Attack by 1 if Red Team has damaged an Asset this game.
learning_note: C2 represents attacker coordination after initial access.

rules_text: If C2 Communication or C2 would be destroyed, destroy this card instead.
learning_note: Redundant attacker communication paths make containment harder.

rules_text: Play only if two or more Blue Team Assets are damaged. Blue Team loses 3 SCP. If Water Tower is damaged, Blue Team loses 1 additional SCP.
flavor_text: The cyber event became an operations call.
learning_note: The most important lesson is how cyber actions create operational consequences.

rules_text: Provides 1 resource for Red Team cards.
learning_note: Resources pace the game and prevent every attack from happening at once.

rules_text: Provides 1 Network resource. If used for C2 or RAT, that card enters with +1 Defense.
flavor_text: Access is easier to keep after a foothold.
learning_note: Network position represents attacker reach inside or near target systems.

rules_text: Provides 1 Internet resource. If used for Recon or Delivery, draw 1 card then discard 1 card.
flavor_text: The outside path was enough to begin.
learning_note: External access gives attackers a starting point for reconnaissance and delivery.

rules_text: Provides 1 Application resource. If used for Cred Attack or Vuln Exploit, that Attack deals +1 damage once per game.
flavor_text: The portal became a pressure point.
learning_note: Application access can turn weak authentication or exposed interfaces into impact.
